concept: Python random standard library documentation, including GUI and Web server capabilities.
evidence: Python standard library random, tkinter, and http.server module documentation
facts: # assembled by the DSCE polyglot assembler (Python)

import tkinter as tk
root = tk.Tk()
root.title("Python GUI App")
root.geometry("300x200")
label = tk.Label(root, text="Hello from Python GUI!", font=("Arial", 16))
label.pack(pady=50)
root.mainloop()

from http.server import SimpleHTTPRequestHandler, HTTPServer
class Handler(SimpleHTTPRequestHandler):
    def do_GET(self):
        self.send_response(200)
        self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/plain")
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(b"Hello from Python Web Server!")
server = HTTPServer(("127.0.0.1", 8080), Handler)
print("Serving on port 8080...")
server.serve_forever()
